full_text:
Kong Yu (Shiyuan) 孔昱 (世元)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Kong Yu (孔昱), styledShiyuan (世元), was born in Lu (aka Luting). One of the Eight Paragons of Jiangxia. Scholar who took a moral line on when to serve. Kong Yu was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Kong Yu lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
